name: @corvina/corvina-app-connect
description: This library enables an application embedded as an iframe in Corvina to retrieve some information such as JWT, organization id, ...

scripts.generate:systemjs:sample: npm run build:systemjs && cp lib/systemjs/* samples/systemjs/js/
scripts.generate:commonjs:sample: npm run build:commonjs && browserify lib/commonjs/index.js > samples/commonjs/js/index.js
scripts.test: npm run generate:systemjs:sample && generate:commonjs:sample && http-server samples/
